sections.paragraph:
Original: יבּק

Transliteration: yabbôq

Phonetic: yab-boke'

BDB Definition:

Jabbok = "emptying"
  1. a stream which intersects the mountain range of Gilead, and falls into the Jordan on the east about midway between the Sea of Galilee and the Dead Sea

Origin: probably from H1238

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
